description: Initializes the tie branch fetching routine ‘NXTTIE’ or ‘NXTTIE3’ for returning tie branches from area IAR. For multisection lines connected to a from area bus, the other endpoint bus is treated as the to bus. Dummy buses of multisection lines are excluded. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = initix(iar)

error_codes.description: No error, ‘NXTTIE’ or ‘NXTTIE3’ is properly initialized.
Area number <= 0 or > largest allowable area number; ‘NXTTIE’ or ‘NXTTIE3’ may not be used.
No buses in area ‘IAR’; ‘NXTTIE’ or ‘NXTTIE3’ may not be used.
